title: Indoor Wood Fireplaces | Heat & Glo
description: Add warmth, comfort and ambiance with our lineup of gas, electric and wood fireplaces, inserts and log sets.

h2: Craving the look, sound and smell of a wood-burning fire? Heat & Glo’s collection of wood fireplaces offers the rustic charm of wood-burning, with a wide range of sizes and styles, at price points you’ll love.

paragraphs: Craving the look, sound and smell of a wood-burning fire? Heat & Glo’s collection of wood fireplaces offers the rustic charm of wood-burning, with a wide range of sizes and styles, at price points you’ll love.

With the biggest viewing area in its class – up to 50” wide – the Rutherford open fireplace commands attention. Enjoy the crackle of a real wood fire thanks to the glass-free design and the look of a site-built masonry fireplace without the price tag. Gas log sets are also available to add to this fireplace, offering an alternative option to enjoy the boldness of an open flame with the convenience of gas. Note: not available in Canada.

With fuel-saving efficiency and the effortless operation of Smart Burn Technology, the Pioneer III wood-burning fireplace supplies serious heat in a beautiful fire. Add up to two heat zone ducts to send warmth into other rooms.

Warm up your whole home safely and efficiently with the Pioneer II. This wood-burning fireplace is EPA-approved, offering a cleaner burn that’s better for you and the environment. Bold flames last up to eight hours from just one load of wood and are encased by your choice of either a rectangular or arch fireplace front.

Live large with the Royal Hearth indoor wood fireplace at our most affordable price. Every time you light up a fire, you will appreciate the clean look, minimal exposed metal, easy damper, mess-saving ash lip, and invisible smoke shield.

Bring the ambiance of a crackling open hearth into your home. The Exclaim open fireplace is a beautiful, wood-burning option. The spacious viewing area – up to 50” – is designed without glass so you can enjoy real fireside authenticity. Gas log sets are also available to add to the Exclaim fireplace if you’re looking for a more consistent burn and streamlined setup. Complete the open fireplace look with your choice of herringbone or traditional brick interior. Note: 50” not available in Canada.
The super-efficient Northstar exceeds EPA 2020 standards as a clean wood-burning fireplace. Each wood load warms a room for up to ten hours, perfect for heating spaces overnight.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.

Please refer to the owner’s/installation manual for complete requirements, specifications, testing and listing information. The heat output as well as the appearance of your unit in your specific application—including the flame, embers and overall product appearance—may vary for a variety of reasons from the data and images presented. Product specifications and pricing are subject to change without notice, and installation must adhere strictly to instructions shipped with product. Hearth & Home Technologies reserves the right to update units periodically. If you need help in determining the product that best suits your needs, please see your local authorized dealer.
